entry.note: <L>763<pc>4,2<k1>aga<k2>aga<h>1<e>2 <hom>1.</hom> <s>aga</s> ¦ <lex>m.</lex> a snake [in this sense perhaps rather <s>a-ga</s>] <ls>L.</ls><info lex="m"/> <LEND>

<L>300<pc>1-0023<k1>aga<k2>aga<h>2 2. {#aga#}¦ (3. {#a + ga#} {%gehend%}) <ls>P. 6,3,77.</ls> <div n="1"> 1) <lex>adj.</lex> {%nicht gehend, nicht im Stande zu gehen%}: {#ago vfzalaH SItena#} <ls>P. 6,3,77</ls>, <ls>Sch.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) <lex>m.</lex> <div n="2"> a) {%Baum%} <ls>AK. 3,4,20.</ls> <ls>H. 1114.</ls> <ls>an. 2,28.</ls> <ls>MED. g. 2.</ls> <ls>ŚIŚ. 4,63.</ls> <div n="2">— b) {%Berg%} <ls>AK. 3,4,20.</ls> <ls>Sch.</ls> zu <ls>H. 1027.</ls> <ls>an. 2,29.</ls> <ls>MED. g. 2.</ls> <ls>P. 6,3,77</ls>, <ls>Sch.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 166, v. l.</ls> <div n="v">— Vgl. {#agacCa, agama#} und {#naga#} . <LEND>

<L>422<pc>1-005-c<k1>aga<k2>aga<h>2 <hom>2.</hom> {#aga#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 *<lex>Adj.</lex> {%nicht gehend, sich nicht bewegend%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <lex>m.</lex> <div n="2">— a〉 {%Baum%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%Berg%}. <LEND>
